---
title: "soltools"
output: github_document
---

`{soltools}` is an R package intended to help VA school division personnel work with Standards of Learning (SOL) data extracts from Pearson

# Installation

You can install `{soltools}` from Github via:

```{r install-block, eval=FALSE}
#if you don't already have {remotes} installed, install it via:
#install.packages("remote")
remotes::install_github("ccps-research-eval/soltools")
```

# Usage

TODO
